SUPPLEMENT PROTOCOL
$20/3mo
TIER 1 — DAILY
Creatine Monohydrate
5g daily · no loading
Morning with water
Protects muscle during 29 lb weight loss. Non-negotiable.
$20/mo
TIER 1 — DAILY
Vitamin D3 + K2
5000 IU D3 + 100mcg K2
Morning with fat
Bone density, testosterone, immunity.
$15/mo
TIER 1 — DAILY
Magnesium Glycinate
400mg every night
9:00pm — every night
Sleep quality, muscle recovery, cramp prevention.
$30/mo
TIER 1 — DAILY
Omega-3 Fish Oil
2–3g EPA+DHA daily
Morning with breakfast
Joint lubrication. Reduces DOMS 20–30%.
$12/mo
TIER 1 — DAILY
Tart Cherry Juice
8oz Montmorency nightly
Every evening
Cuts DOMS by 24 hours. Montmorency variety only.
$8/mo
TIER 1 — HARD DAYS
Melatonin 0.5mg
0.5mg ONLY — not 5mg
9pm hard training days
Anchors circadian rhythm. 0.5mg = no grogginess.
$50/mo
TIER 2 — POST WORKOUT
Whey Protein Isolate
25g within 20min post
20-minute window after training
20-min window = 300% faster glycogen resynthesis.
$30/mo
TIER 2 — TRAINING DAYS
Electrolytes (LMNT)
1 packet during + AM
During training + first AM
Dead legs is often electrolyte depletion, not fitness.
$15/mo
TIER 3 — WEEK 13+
Beta-Alanine
3.2g daily split
Breakfast + pre-PM
Buffers lactic acid. Key for 800m/1500m.
$3/session
TIER 3 — HARD SESSIONS + RACES
Beetroot / Nitrates
2 shots 2–3hrs pre
Hard sessions + races
1–3% proven improvement. Real seconds at your level.
$20/mo
TIER 3 — WEEK 13+
Ashwagandha KSM-66
600mg daily
Every morning
VO2max +7–12%. Must be KSM-66 form.

INTEL
I'm KODA — your autonomous nutrition AI. I think step-by-step, learn from every meal you log, and track what works for YOUR body.

I can: Plan your meals, analyze your week, tell you what to eat before runs, figure out why you're not losing weight, and build grocery lists — all based on YOUR data.

Tap a task below or ask me anything.

CONNECT YOUR DEVICES
SYSTEM DIAGNOSTIC
Tap RUN CHECK to test all connections...
FIRST TIME SETUP GUIDE — TAP TO EXPAND
Your GEDYON server runs on Railway. It handles all OAuth so your credentials never touch the HTML file. Here's everything you need:
① RAILWAY ENV VARS — railway.app → your project → Variables
SERVER_URL = https://gedyon-server-production.up.railway.app
STRAVA_CLIENT_ID = (from strava.com/settings/api)
STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET = (from strava.com/settings/api)
STRAVA_VERIFY_TOKEN = gedyon2028
WHOOP_CLIENT_ID = (from developer.whoop.com)
WHOOP_CLIENT_SECRET = (from developer.whoop.com)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = (from console.anthropic.com/keys)
② STRAVA APP — strava.com/settings/api
App Name: GEDYON
Category: Training
Callback Domain: gedyon-server-production.up.railway.app
→ Copy Client ID + Client Secret into Railway vars above
③ WHOOP APP — developer.whoop.com → Create App
App Name: GEDYON
Redirect URI: https://gedyon-server-production.up.railway.app/auth/whoop/callback
Scopes: read:recovery read:sleep read:workout read:profile read:cycles offline
→ Copy Client ID + Client Secret into Railway vars above
④ ANTHROPIC API KEY — console.anthropic.com/keys
Create a new key → copy it → paste into Railway ANTHROPIC_API_KEY var
This powers ATLAS, the food photo AI, and all workout analysis.

STRAVA — ALL RUNS & RIDES
Pulls your complete activity history — every run, distance, pace, heart rate, elevation and GPS route. New workouts sync automatically the moment you finish.
STRAVA CONNECTED
3
WHOOP — RECOVERY & HRV
Pulls every recovery score since you got the band — HRV, RHR, strain, and sleep data all flow into your Recovery Score automatically.
WHOOP CONNECTED
WHOOP REDIRECT URL:
4
PELOTON — POWER & OUTPUT
Pulls every ride — output (kJ), watts, cadence, speed, HR, instructor and class name. Just enter your Peloton login.
PELOTON CONNECTED
IMPORT PELOTON DATA
Go to members.onepeloton.com → your profile → Download Workouts CSV → upload it here. Imports your full history with accurate pace, HR, output and splits.
APPLE HEALTH + FITNESS
WATCH & FITNESS APP WORKOUTS · SLEEP · HR · HRV
NOT IMPORTED
Imports your complete Apple Watch + Fitness app history — every run, ride, sleep night, HRV reading and calorie burn. Anything the Fitness app tracked is in here too (it all lives in Apple Health). Includes Peloton data written by the Peloton app.

HOW TO EXPORT (2 min):
1. iPhone → Health app → tap your photo (top right)
2. Scroll to the bottom → Export All Health Data → Export
3. When the share sheet opens → Save to Files
4. Come back here → tap below → pick export.zip from Files
After import, your fitness placement re-runs automatically.
Parsing...
AUTO-SYNC ON OPEN
Pull new workouts every time you open GEDYON
